comment: "I liked learning in depth EXACTLY what the pulse oximeter does, its vital importance in diagnosis, and interpreting readings / measurements. This was excellent!"
"This course's information is very useful for us in developing countries, we are very privileged to access it online. Thank you very much."
"Thank you for this course. I really appreciate it and I acquired so much from this course."
"I thought it was very interactive and explained concepts thoroughly!"
"The detailed checklist of what could be the reason for a patient to desaturate in the OT was very helpful."
"I liked the practical applications as well as the multiple choice quizzes along the way."
